arts.ttl: Confirmed Lineups: Bayer 04 Leverkusen vs. VfL Wolfsburg
arts.sum: The lineups for this afternoon's Bundesliga clash between Germany's two "company cubs" have been confirmed.

arts.ttl: Liverpool ready to go all out and pay a club-record fee for 38-G/A attacker
arts.sum: Liverpool are very interested in signing the German international midfielder Florian Wirtz. The 21-year-old attacking midfielder has made a name for himself with his performance in the Bundesliga, and he helped Bayer Leverkusen win the league last season. Wirtz has established himself as one of the best young players in world football and he scored […] The post Liverpool ready to go all out and pay a club-record fee for 38-G/A attacker appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayer Leverkusen XI vs Wolfsburg
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen return to Bundesliga action against Wolfsburg today following a rampant 4-0 win over Feyenoord in the Champions League on Thursday evening. Coming into this game, Xabi Alonso has…

arts.ttl: Sunday's Bundesliga predictions including Bayer Leverkusen vs. Wolfsburg
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayer Leverkusen vs. Wolfsburg.

arts.ttl: “We’re Bayern and we don’t change” — Harry Kane promises to bring the fight to Leverkusen next week
arts.sum: Next Saturday, it will be the German Rekordmeister hosting the defending champions. Next Saturday, we will find out when Bayern Munich plays host to Bayer Leverkusen in the most anticipated match of the Bundesliga Hinrunde .

arts.ttl: Florian Wirtz: Liverpool target first €100m signing as interest in Leverkusen ace confirmed
arts.sum: Liverpool are interested in signing Bayer Leverkusen playmaker Florian Wirtz in a deal that would likely shatter the club’s transfer record. He has a contract now until 2027, so Leverkusen want a big fee for his services - €150m.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen sensation Wirtz names Barcelona star as world’s best talent
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz has on Saturday moved to reveal his appreciation for a member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona. Wirtz, for his part, is…

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Wolfsburg preview: Champions targeting another victory
arts.sum: Free-scoring Bayer Leverkusen will look to claim a third consecutive victory in all competitions when they play host to Wolfsburg on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Wolfsburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Bayer Leverkusen and Wolfsburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso to Real Madrid taking shape as 'preparations' begin
arts.sum: Real Madrid are positioning themselves to make a move for Xabi Alonso, according to German media. At least that is according to BILD, which asserts that Leverkusen director Simon Rolfes is working hard to prepare the club for radical changes next year.
